overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a tactical character engaging in cover-based combat behind a food cart in a neon-lit commercial corridor, followed by exploration through narrow passages with vending machines and graffiti-covered walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial food vendor area with cover

events.description: character fires rifle from behind cover, visible muzzle flash and laser sight trajectory

agents.ego_description: tactical character in green uniform crouched behind blue food cart, aiming down sights at distant targets

entered.detail: light blue mobile food vendor cart with yellow container and metal pots
large illuminated digital display with orange neon border showing menu items
wide concrete staircase leading upward to the right
purple and green neon lighting illuminating the corridor background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a tactical character in green gear positioned behind a blue food cart in a neon-lit commercial corridor. The character remains in cover, aiming a rifle toward the left while a digital menu board glows on the right. At approximately 11.5 seconds, the character fires the weapon, visible by the muzzle flash and laser sight, maintaining the defensive position throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with stairs and digital advertising

events.description: camera leaves stationary cover position and begins moving forward through the plaza

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the open indoor plaza, passing digital billboards and concrete stairs

entered.detail: tall vertical digital advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics
wide open concrete floor area with scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from stationary combat to forward motion, leaving the food cart behind and entering an open commercial plaza. Digital billboards line the left wall while concrete stairs ascend on the right. The environment shifts from the confined cover position to a more open thoroughfare with scattered debris on the floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service corridor with vending machines and graffiti

events.description: entering darker narrow corridor with graffiti-covered walls and vending machines

agents.ego_description: proceeding through narrow corridor, passing illuminated vending machines and graffiti walls

notable_agents.action: person in red top sitting on stool next to white cooler, facing the graffiti wall

entered.detail: green vending machine with red 'ALL' signage and illuminated product display
vending machine with green 'FUTURE' text and mesh front
dark wall covered in white and yellow graffiti tags including 'NCPD' and 'HDP'
stack of cardboard boxes and debris near the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow, darker corridor illuminated by vending machine lights. The camera passes a green 'ALL' vending machine and another labeled 'FUTURE' on the left, while the right wall features extensive graffiti including 'NCPD' tags. An NPC sits on a stool near a white cooler, facing the wall. The corridor feels enclosed and gritty, with cardboard boxes and debris scattered near the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a tense combat position in a neon-lit corridor into a gritty, enclosed urban alleyway. It begins with a tactical character in green gear taking cover behind a blue food cart, aiming and firing a rifle toward the left beneath the glow of a digital menu board. As the character leaves the defensive position, the camera pushes forward into an open commercial plaza characterized by towering digital billboards and concrete stairs. The scene then shifts from the open thoroughfare into a narrow, darker corridor where the light is provided by glowing vending machines and the walls are covered in NCPD graffiti. Finally, the camera glides past a seated NPC and scattered cardboard boxes, deepening the sense of enclosure within the gritty environment.
